releases.name: v0.1.0
releases.body:
# zlog v0.1.0 – First Release

> [!WARNING]
> **Early Preview:**  
> zlog is under active development. APIs and features may change.  
> Please report issues and help us shape the future of structured logging in Zig.

---

## 🚀 Highlights

- **Structured, strongly-typed logging** for Zig
- **Synchronous and asynchronous** logging modes
- **W3C Trace Context** support for distributed tracing
- **Comprehensive benchmarks** and test coverage

---

## 🆕 What’s Included

- Core logger with sync/async modes
- Strongly-typed log fields (string, int, uint, float, bool, null)
- Configurable log levels and output
- Trace context propagation and child span support
- Benchmarks and test suite

---

## ⚠️ Stability & Feedback

This is an **initial preview**.  
We encourage early adopters to:
- Experiment and provide feedback
- Report issues and suggest improvements
- Contribute tests, benchmarks, and docs

APIs are not yet stable and may change in upcoming releases.

---

## 🛣️ Roadmap

Planned for upcoming releases:
- More output formats (e.g., plain text, custom sinks)
- Log rotation and file output
- Extended trace context features
- Integration with observability stacks
- Further performance optimizations

---

## 📢 Get Involved

- Read the [README](./README.md) for usage and examples
- Open issues and PRs to help us improve
- 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/hendriknielaender/zlog/compare/v0.0.1-beta...v0.1.0

* Overhauled zlog api https://github.com/hendriknielaender/zlog/commit/02c73ea8ad60803f3c06702a47a17e6998b138a3


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/hendriknielaender/zlog/compare/v0.0.1-alpha...v0.0.1-beta
